note: TRINITY IS LIVE on chain. (1) Explorer Developer Note rewritten with the calmer English copy: three-factor uncertainty list (regulation, community adoption, exchange listing), explicit acknowledgement that ConvergenceX has not been audited by an independent security firm, the line 'SOST may never obtain market value. It may never be listed. It may fail.' kept in red so no false expectations are created. English only. The signature line was removed. (2) New TRINITY IS LIVE banner inserted immediately after the developer note. Click-to-expand (default collapsed) with a Details/Collapse pill button matching the existing V12 banner style. Green-themed (rgba(46,139,87,*)) to differentiate from V12 red. Carries the first public Trinity proof anchor: AOI Kalgoorlie Phase 1, block #8085, TXID d68678b5d15ca8a60b70a7aa17647bfa12271d342eef066e1b4a832f4624f3db, capsule text 'trinity-proof kalgoorlie_phase1 3a28a4b112fe95df', proof_bundle_sha256 3a28a4b112fe95df85ab2ab91deb7698ebeb1d9182297f06635fd12fd4053a02, merkle_root a818a1e4799ec34fd5a65b17d180a9534f791d4cd49f54c97b21c11d7b0e28b4. Block and TXID resolve via existing showBlockByHeight() and showTxDetail(). Bottom note clarifies the capsule is a cryptographic timestamp, not a mineral reserve claim. NO consensus, RPC, node, miner, wallet, or wire-format change.
